params.note: Frozen Jina baseline for ADR 0020 quality gate. Read-only reference — do not overwrite. Captured before ADR 0016 Qwen3 default switch (see ADR 0016 Measured outcomes).

metrics_by_tag_note: Per-tag MRR/NDCG not captured in 2026-07-02 Jina run; gate uses recall@10 only (ADR 0020).

multi_hop_2hop.note: Two-hop client RRF on 4 multi_hop queries (2026-07-02 Jina baseline).
